description: Mobile power generator fleet monitoring and remote diagnostics.
challenge: Rolling rental fleets require rapid deployment, remote monitoring of fuel, runtime and maintenance scheduling. Intermittent connectivity and harsh environments make fleet supervision costly and error-prone.
response: VITO provides continuous generator telemetry, fuel-level alerts, and runtime analytics. Noah Guardian auto-schedules maintenance, compresses logs for efficient backhaul, and secures operator access via Tailscale.
result: Improved fleet uptime, reduced maintenance costs, and remote issue resolution without routine on-site visits.
